concept: Wisdomkeeper / One with a Vast, Grounded Mind
description: A respected person within a community who holds and protects the collective knowledge, stories, and traditions. They are a living library of cultural memory and experience.
rationale: A composition of the established roots 'the' (thoughtful consideration), 'who' (encompassing, vast breath), and 'ma' (grounded presence). The word's structure literally means 'one with a thoughtful, vast, and grounded presence,' defining a wisdomkeeper by their quality of being. The use of two fricative digraphs gives the word a resonant, breathy quality.
